cacheserverSpec.description: Configuration for the LMCache cache server deployment

affinity.description: Affinity configuration. If specified, takes precedence over nodeSelectorTerms.

annotations.description: Customized annotations for the cache server deployment

containerPort.description: Port the cache server container is listening on

enabled.description: Whether to enable the cache server

repository.description: Docker image repository for the cache server

tag.description: Docker image tag for the cache server

imagePullPolicy.description: Image pull policy for the cache server

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for private container registries

labels.description: Customized labels for the cache server deployment and service

failureThreshold.description: The number of consecutive failures allowed before considering the probe as failed.

initialDelaySeconds.description: The number of seconds to wait before starting the first probe.

periodSeconds.description: The number of seconds to wait between consecutive probes.

timeoutSeconds.description: The number of seconds to wait for a probe response before considering it as failed.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for the cache server pods

priorityClassName.description: Priority class for the cache server pods

replicaCount.description: Number of replicas for the cache server pod

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the cache server container

runtimeClassName.description: RuntimeClassName configuration for the cache server pods

schedulerName.description: SchedulerName configuration for the cache server pods

serde.description: Serialization/deserialization format for the cache server

serviceAnnotations.description: Service annotations for the cache server service

servicePort.description: Port the cache server service will listen on

serviceType.description: Kubernetes service type for the cache server

strategy.description: Deployment strategy for the cache server pods

type.description: Customize updateStrategy of the cache server deployment.

tolerations.description: Tolerations configuration for the cache server pods

extraObjects.description: Array of extra Kubernetes objects to deploy. Each object should be a valid Kubernetes manifest in YAML format. This can be used to deploy additional resources such as ConfigMaps, Secrets, or custom resources that are not directly supported by the chart's built-in configuration. Supports use of custom Helm templates.

grafanaDashboards.description: Set to true do deploy dashboards stored in the "dashboards" directory as configmaps. This requires the kube-prometheus-stack to be deployed with Grafana enabled and properly configured to pick up dashboards from configmaps.

annotations.description: Additional annotations to add to the dashboard configmaps

labels.description: Additional labels to add to the dashboard configmaps

kube-prometheus-stack.description: Kube Prometheus Stack dependency chart configuration. More values can be found [here](https://github.com/prometheus-community/helm-charts/blob/main/charts/kube-prometheus-stack/values.yaml).

extraArgs.description: Extra arguments for the lora controller

annotations.description: Annotations to be added to loraController pdb

enabled.description: Deploy a PodDisruptionBudget for the loraController deployment

labels.description: Labels to be added to loraController pdb

maxUnavailable.description: Number of pods that are unavailable after eviction as number or percentage (eg.: 50%).

minAvailable.description: Number of pods that are available after eviction as number or percentage (eg.: 50%)

prometheus-adapter.description: Prometheus Adapter dependency chart configuration. More values can be found [here](https://github.com/prometheus-community/helm-charts/blob/main/charts/prometheus-adapter/values.yaml).

enableRouter.description: Whether to enable the router service

engineScrapeInterval.description: Interval in seconds to scrape the serving engine metrics

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for private container registries Example: imagePullSecrets: - name: my-registry-secret

annotations.description: Additional annotations for the Ingress resource

className.description: IngressClass that will be used to implement the Ingress

tls.description: The tls configuration for hostnames to be covered with this ingress record.

k8sServiceDiscoveryType.description: Service discovery mode type, supports "pod-ip" or "service-name". Defaults to "pod-ip" if not set.

labels.description: Customized labels for the router deployment

lmcacheConfig.description: lmcache configuration for the router deployment

logLevel.description: LMCache log level for the router deployment.

lmcacheControllerPort.description: Set lmcache port for the router deployment

nodePort.description: Fixed NodePort for the router service when serviceType is NodePort.

otel.description: OpenTelemetry tracing configuration When otelEndpoint is set, tracing is automatically enabled

secure.description: Use secure (TLS) connection for OTLP exporter (default: false, i.e., insecure)

annotations.description: Annotations to be added to router pdb

enabled.description: Deploy a PodDisruptionBudget for the router deployment

labels.description: Labels to be added to router pdb

maxUnavailable.description: Number of pods that are unavailable after eviction as number or percentage (eg.: 50%).

minAvailable.description: Number of pods that are available after eviction as number or percentage (eg.: 50%)

podAnnotations.description: Customized pod annotations for the router pods

repository.description: The docker image of the router. The following values are defaults:

requestStatsWindow.description: Window size in seconds to calculate the request statistics

rootPath.description: FastAPI root path for hosting under a subpath (e.g. /vllm)

route.description: Expose the service via gateway-api HTTPRoute More routes can be added by adding a dictionary key like the 'main' route. Requires Gateway API resources and suitable controller installed within the cluster (see: https://gateway-api.sigs.k8s.io/guides/)

apiVersion.description: Set the route apiVersion, e.g. gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1 or gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1alpha2

httpsRedirect.description: create http route for redirect (https://gateway-api.sigs.k8s.io/guides/http-redirect-rewrite/#http-to-https-redirects) # Take care that you only enable this on the http listener of the gateway to avoid an infinite redirect. # matches, filters and additionalRules will be ignored if this is set to true.

kind.description: Set the route kind Valid options are GRPCRoute, HTTPRoute, TCPRoute, TLSRoute, UDPRoute

serviceAnnotations.description: Service annotations if you use a LoadBalancer or NodePort service type

serviceDiscovery.description: Service discovery mode, supports "k8s" or "static". Defaults to "k8s" if not set.

serviceMonitor.description: TODO: Readiness probe configuration startupProbe: initialDelaySeconds: 5 periodSeconds: 5 failureThreshold: 100 httpGet:

enabled.description: Specifies whether to create a ServiceMonitor resource for collecting Prometheus metrics

honorLabels.description: Let prometheus add an exported_ prefix to conflicting labels

metricRelabelings.description: Metric relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion. [Metric Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#metric_relabel_configs)

relabelings.description: Relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion. [Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#relabel_config)

scrapeTimeout.description: Timeout if metrics can't be retrieved in given time interval

sessionKey.description: session key if using "session" routing logic

staticBackends.description: If serviceDiscovery is set to "static", the comma-separated values below are required. There needs to be the same number of backends and models

vllmApiKey.description: API key for securing the vLLM models. Must be an object referencing an existing secret. .Values.servingEngineSpec.vllmApiKey takes priority.

secretKey.description: Key within the secret that contains the vLLM API key

secretName.description: Name of the existing Kubernetes secret that contains the vLLM API key

configs.description: Set other environment variables from config map

labels.description: Customized labels for the serving engine deployment

failureThreshold.description: Number of times after which if a probe fails in a row, Kubernetes considers that the overall check has failed: the container is not alive

httpGet.description: Configuration of the Kubelet http request on the server

path.description: Path to access on the HTTP server

port.description: Name or number of the port to access on the container, on which the server is listening

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before liveness probe is initiated

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the liveness probe

failureThreshold.description: Number of times after which if a probe fails in a row, Kubernetes considers that the overall check has failed: the container is not alive

httpGet.description: Configuration of the Kubelet http request on the server

path.description: Path to access on the HTTP server

port.description: Name or number of the port to access on the container, on which the server is listening

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before readiness probe is initiated

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the readiness probe

runtimeClassName.description: RuntimeClassName configuration, set to "nvidia" if the model requires GPU

enabled.description: Specifies whether to create a ServiceMonitor resource for collecting Prometheus metrics

honorLabels.description: Let prometheus add an exported_ prefix to conflicting labels

metricRelabelings.description: Metric relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion. [Metric Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#metric_relabel_configs)

relabelings.description: Relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion. [Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#relabel_config)

scrapeTimeout.description: Timeout if metrics can't be retrieved in given time interval

failureThreshold.description: Number of times after which if a probe fails in a row, Kubernetes considers that the overall check has failed: the container is not ready

httpGet.description: Configuration of the Kubelet http request on the server

path.description: Path to access on the HTTP server

port.description: Name or number of the port to access on the container, on which the server is listening

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before startup probe is initiated

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the startup probe

tolerations.description: Tolerations configuration (when there are taints on nodes) Example: tolerations: - key: "node-role.kubernetes.io/control-plane" operator: "Exists" effect: "NoSchedule"

sharedPvcStorage.description: Configuration for a shared PVC that can be mounted to multiple model deployments.

accessModes.description: Access modes for the shared storage volume

enabled.description: Whether to enable shared storage for the models

hostPath.description: Host path for the shared storage volume. Specifying a hostPath of nfs server will create a PersistentVolume. These fields should be omitted to rely on dynamic provisioning of PersistentVolumeClaims.

nfs.description: NFS configuration for the shared storage volume

path.description: NFS export path for the shared storage volume

server.description: NFS server address for the shared storage volume

size.description: Size of the shared storage volume

storageClass.description: Storage class name for the shared storage volume
